daily.today_energy: The universe is whispering softly to you today, Pisces. Trust the quiet moments—they're holding important messages. Your intuition is extra sharp, so lean into those gut feelings without overthinking.
daily.love: Someone's energy is shifting around you, and it feels significant. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's an invitation to be more authentic. Let people see the real you, not the version you think they want.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are gold right now, even if they feel a little unconventional. Don't dim your vision to fit the mold. Your unique perspective is exactly what's needed, so speak up with quiet confidence.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Move in ways that feel nourishing rather than punishing—think flowing rather than forced. Hydrate well and give yourself permission to rest without guilt.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically leveling up this week. Mercury's vibe is pushing you to trust those gut feelings that usually hit different. Expect clarity in places where you've been sitting with confusion.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or manifesting, this week asks you to be vulnerable in a way that actually feels safe. Someone's about to show up for you—or you'll realize someone already has been.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that's been living rent-free in your head. Your unique perspective is literally what people need.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't laziness—it's actually the move. Lean into activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Flow over force.
